title: baeckea oligandra
intro: Baeckea oligandra, also known as the native Australian plant, is a shrub native to eastern Australia, particularly in the states of New South Wales and Queensland. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Baeckea oligandra include its potential to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and exhibit antiseptic properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
